comments.text:
Surfaced 2026-06-24 rebasing epic mutagen-33b onto main: mix spec.check (branch-analysis on main) flags change_type=outside_current_coverage / impacted_subjects=mutagen.mutation_pipeline (branch-guard bucket B). CF1 (mutagen-33b.1) + CF2a (mutagen-33b.2) shipped code that changed mutation_pipeline behavior, but the original tickets had no Advances: field so no subject spec/decision was updated.

Advances: mutagen.mutation_pipeline

## Scope (spec/docs only — NO product code; CF1/CF2a code already merged on the epic branch)
Add to .spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md:
1. A new `must` requirement for CF1: on the parallel outer-task {:exit} fold branch (killed/aborted per-site worker), the runner tears down + drains sibling per-site tasks FIRST, THEN sweeps ALL scoped modules through BeamCache restore — so a killed parallel worker leaves NO module loaded as its mutant; the sweep is strictly ordered AFTER sibling teardown (never concurrent with a live sibling). Cross-ref r6 (restore), r4 (timeout-purge).
2. A new `must` requirement for CF2a: when resolved max_concurrency > 1, a one-time stderr EXPERIMENTAL warning is emitted (names kill/survive misclassification + corrupted-coverage risk on real ExUnit/:cover; states the safe path is default 1); silent for max_concurrency == 1. Help text (mix mutagen) + README mark --max-concurrency > 1 experimental.
3. Scenarios for both, with spec-verification entries pointing at the EXISTING tests (mutation_runner_parallel_test.exs: the outer-task-crash restore-sweep test + the experimental-warning test). Flip execute: true.
4. A decision file (.spec/decisions/) documenting the gate+warn / real-isolation-deferred posture (CF2b mutagen-33b.3 deferred). This satisfies the "cross-cutting change spans multiple subjects but no decision file changed" branch finding.

## Allowed touches
.spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md, .spec/decisions/<new>.md (+ .spec/state.json regen). Do NOT touch lib/ or test/ (CF1/CF2a code is already correct + merged).

## Done
- spec.validate passes (errors=0).
- mix spec.check branch-guard no longer reports mutagen.mutation_pipeline as outside_current_coverage (bucket-B cleared). Pre-existing overlap/duplicate_covers corpus errors on OTHER subjects (bucket A) are out of scope and may remain.

IMPLEMENTED

Commit: 8a1cc00 (branch mutagen-33b.7/spec-delta)

Files touched (only the allowed three; no lib/ or test/):
- .spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md
- .spec/decisions/parallel_experimental_gate.md (new)
- .spec/state.json (regenerated by mix spec.validate / mix spec.check)

New requirements:
- mutagen.mutation_pipeline.r17 (must) — CF1: on the parallel outer-task {:exit} fold branch, runner halts with {:outer_task_exit,...} sentinel, then abort_after_outer_task_exit/3 tears down + drains all sibling per-site Task.Supervisor children FIRST, THEN sweeps ALL scoped modules through BeamCache restore (strictly ordered after drain, never concurrent with a live sibling). Cross-refs r6 (restore), r4 (timeout purge), r15 (parallel dispatch + shared-state caveat). Surfaces as :unrecoverable_restore_failure.
- mutagen.mutation_pipeline.r18 (must) — CF2a: resolved max_concurrency > 1 emits a ONE-TIME stderr EXPERIMENTAL warning (names kill/survive misclassification + corrupted coverage on real ExUnit/:cover; states safe path is default 1); SILENT for == 1. mix help mutagen + README mark --max-concurrency > 1 experimental.

New scenarios (distinct covering scenario per requirement — no new duplicate_covers):
- mutagen.mutation_pipeline.s18 — covers: [r17]
- mutagen.mutation_pipeline.s19 — covers: [r18]

Verification stubs flipped (kind: command, execute: true), each pointing at the EXISTING tests:
- mutagen.mutation_pipeline.v10 — covers r17 — target: mix test test/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner_parallel_test.exs --only describe:"outer task crash restore sweep" (test "worker exit tears down siblings before restoring snapshotted scoped modules")
- mutagen.mutation_pipeline.v11 — covers r18 — target: mix test test/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner_parallel_test.exs --only describe:"experimental parallel-mode warning" (test "warns once for max_concurrency > 1 and stays silent for max_concurrency: 1")

Decision file: mutagen.decision.parallel_experimental_gate (.spec/decisions/parallel_experimental_gate.md) — affects [mutagen.mutation_pipeline, mutagen.cli]; documents gate+warn-now / defer real in-VM-vs-OS isolation to CF2b (mutagen-33b.3) and WHY (ExUnit server, Code.Server load locks, and :cover state are process-global; real isolation needs OS-process sharding). Bidirectional link added: subject spec-meta decisions: now lists mutagen.decision.parallel_experimental_gate. This satisfies the "cross-cutting change spans multiple subjects but no decision file changed" branch finding.

mix spec.validate: status=pass errors=0 warnings=0

mix spec.check branch findings: findings dropped 33 -> 29. Bucket B CLEARED:
- branch_guard_missing_decision_update (cross-cutting, no decision file) — gone.
- branch_guard_missing_subject_update for lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (was: impacts mutagen.mutation_pipeline) — gone.
- branch_guard_missing_subject_update for test/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner_parallel_test.exs (was: impacts mutagen.mutation_pipeline) — gone.
No mutation_pipeline ERROR remains except the 6 pre-existing bucket-A overlap/duplicate_covers (r5/r6/r7/r12/r14/r16) which are out of scope. My additions (r17/r18/s18/s19/v10/v11) introduced ZERO new findings.

Note on the residual summary line: branch change_type=outside_current_coverage and branch impacted_subjects=mutagen.cli, mutagen.mutation_pipeline still print. These are NOT per-subject findings — verified against deps/spec_led_ex/lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex guidance/1: change_type is outside_current_coverage solely because uncovered_policy_files != [] (the cond first branch), and that uncovered policy file is README.md (a branch_guard_unmapped_change WARNING, bucket A). impacted_subjects is a static changed-file -> subject roll-up (lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex is surface for both mutagen.cli and mutagen.mutation_pipeline), not a coverage gap. The bucket-B ERROR-severity findings that previously flagged mutation_pipeline as missing-coverage are gone.

Ticket left open per instructions.

AUDIT: APPROVE (auto — selective audit)
Session: orchestrator-3b779503
Log: /Users/mz/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/3b779503-5d89-4838-8350-946f2c3304f0.jsonl

Reasoning: Orchestrator cold-verified the spec delta firsthand. Only the 3 Allowed files changed (.spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md, .spec/decisions/parallel_experimental_gate.md, .spec/state.json). mix spec.validate status=pass errors=0 warnings=0. mix spec.check 33->29 findings: bucket-B branch_guard ERRORs naming mutagen.mutation_pipeline (missing subject/decision update) are CLEARED; r17/r18 + s18/s19 + v10/v11 added with no new duplicate_covers. Remaining 29 are pre-existing bucket-A corpus overlaps on other subjects + a README WARNING (out of scope per user). No auditor spawned per selective-audit policy.

title: Spec delta: document CF1 parallel outer-task restore sweep + CF2a experimental gate
